items.title: The chunker isn't what's slow
items.scenario: Pipeline takes 4s/document. The team assumes the chunker is the culprit.
items.explanation: cProfile shows `chunk_text` takes 0.04s; the dominant cost is a `re.compile(...)` re-built per call inside `normalise_whitespace`. Five-line fix; 100× speedup.

items.title: Counting calls reveals N+1 patterns
items.scenario: Embedding 1000 documents calls the embedder 12,000 times — not 1000.
items.explanation: cProfile's `ncalls` column reveals the 12× — the pipeline embeds each document for every section. Batch them; one cProfile run paid for itself.

items.title: Comparing two reranker implementations
items.scenario: You suspect a heuristic reranker is faster than a cross-encoder; you need numbers.
items.explanation: Profile both on the same 100-query workload; compare `cumtime` of each `rank(...)`. Decision now data-driven, not vibes-based.

items.title: Locating a surprise JSON cost
items.scenario: An eval script takes 6 minutes; nobody knows why.
items.explanation: cProfile shows 3 of those 6 minutes inside `json.loads`. The eval is parsing the same JSON file 10,000 times. Cache the parsed value once; 6 minutes → 2.

items.title: Visualizing with snakeviz
items.scenario: The text profile is too noisy to interpret.
items.explanation: `python -m cProfile -o profile.out script.py && snakeviz profile.out`. The browser icicle-chart shows the call graph proportional to time — clicking dives into hot frames.
